questions.question: Since 1968, the New York Knicks have played their home basketball games at the current iteration of which iconic Manhattan arena?
Selected first overall in the inaugural 1985 NBA Draft lottery, this Hall of Fame center from Georgetown University spent 15 seasons as the franchise's cornerstone star.
Known by his stylish nickname 'Clyde', this flamboyant point guard led the franchise to its only two NBA championships and later became their long-time television color commentator.
This legendary Knicks captain famously limped onto the court at Madison Square Garden before Game 7 of the 1970 NBA Finals to inspire a victory over the Los Angeles Lakers.
Who was the legendary, cigar-chomping head coach who guided the franchise to both of its NBA championship titles in 1970 and 1973?
Acquired in a blockbuster 2011 trade with the Denver Nuggets, this scoring forward won the NBA scoring title with the Knicks during the 2012-13 season.
Signing as a free agent in 2022, this former Villanova point guard rapidly transformed the franchise, earning multiple All-NBA selections and becoming the team's official captain.
Which Oscar-winning film director is globally recognized as the ultimate celebrity superfan of the Knicks, famously sitting courtside at Madison Square Garden for decades?
On Christmas Day in 1984, this legendary Knicks explosive scoring forward erupted for a historic, single-game franchise record of 60 points against the New Jersey Nets.
In the first round of the 1999 NBA Playoffs, this shooting guard hit a dramatic, last-second running floater against the Miami Heat to achieve a historic No. 8 seed upset.
Hired as head coach in 2020, this defensive mastermind won the NBA Coach of the Year award during his debut season leading the team.

An undrafted guard who became an emotional heartbeat of the 1990s teams, he is immortalized in franchise lore for his thunderous left-handed dunk over Michael Jordan and Horace Grant known as 'The Dunk'.
Acquired from the Chicago Bulls in 1988, this fiercely protective power forward served as Patrick Ewing's primary enforcer and physical rebounder for ten seasons.
Which legendary sports promoter and basketball executive founded the New York Knicks franchise in 1946 as a charter member of the BAA?
The highly successful 2023-24 Knicks roster gained national media attention for prominently featuring a core group of collegiate teammates who won national titles at which university?
Since 1999, who has served as the highly visible executive chairman of Madison Square Garden Sports and governor of the New York Knicks?
Signing with New York in 2019, this versatile power forward went on to win the NBA Most Improved Player award in 2021 while leading the team back to the playoffs.
Acquired ahead of the lockout-shortened 1999 season, this dynamic, cornrowed swingman teamed up with Allan Houston to carry New York to the 1999 NBA Finals.
Which former player and future Hall of Famer served as the head coach of the Knicks from 2001 to 2004, bridging the gap between Jeff Van Gundy and Lenny Wilkens?
In February 2012, an unheralded guard out of Harvard University sparked a wild, global cultural phenomenon in New York City by racking up historic scoring numbers in his first career starts.
Acquired from the rival Baltimore Bullets in 1971, this dazzling, spin-moving Hall of Fame guard formed the legendary 'Rolls Royce Backcourt' alongside Walt Frazier.
The Knicks played their very first regular-season basketball game on November 1, 1946, securing a narrow 68-66 victory on the road against which opposing franchise?
This former Detroit Pistons Hall of Fame point guard had a highly controversial and scrutinized tenure as the President of Basketball Operations and Head Coach for the Knicks during the mid-2000s.
This brilliant forward from the 1970s championship teams went on to serve three terms as a United States Senator representing New Jersey and ran for president in 2000.
In March 2020, the Knicks hired this powerful former CAA sports agent to take over the franchise as the team's President of Basketball Operations.
Which Eastern Conference opponent did the Knicks sweep in four games in the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals to secure their spot in the NBA Finals?
Prior to their historic breakthrough in 2026, in what calendar year did the Knicks last make an appearance in the NBA Finals?
By winning Game 4 of the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals, how many consecutive postseason games did the Knicks win to tie or set a franchise playoff record?
In what calendar year did the Knicks win their most recent NBA Championship prior to the 2026 season?
Which franchise individual honor did Jalen Brunson win immediately following the conclusion of the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals?
Which first-round opponent did the Knicks defeat in 6 games during the opening round of the 2026 playoffs?
Which Atlantic Division rival did the Knicks eliminate in the 2026 Eastern Conference Semifinals?
On what exact date in 2026 are the NBA Finals scheduled to begin for the Knicks?
Which Knicks center, acquired via a blockbuster trade from Minnesota, posted a dominant 19-point, 14-rebound double-double in the 2026 Eastern Conference Finals clincher?
Which Villanova alumnus and defensive stalwart wears jersey number 25 for the Knicks during this playoff run?
What is the birth country of starting power forward OG Anunoby?
Which foundational Knicks center, drafted by the team in 2018, wears jersey number 23?
Which rookie point guard out of Marquette, drafted by the Knicks in 2024, serves as Jalen Brunson’s primary backup in the 2026 rotation?
From which Western Conference franchise did the Knicks famously sign Jalen Brunson as a free agent?
Which high-energy guard on the current roster wears jersey number 3 and is famous for his relentless rebounding?
Which former NBA Sixth Man of the Year winner was added to the Knicks' bench depth during the 2025-2026 season and wears number 00?
Which versatile forward on the roster was originally selected 9th overall by the San Antonio Spurs in the 2022 NBA Draft?
What college did backup point guard Miles McBride attend before being drafted into the NBA?
Who is the president of basketball operations for the Knicks who served as the chief architect of this 2026 Finals roster?
Who is the longtime owner of the Madison Square Garden Company and the Knicks franchise?
What is the official corporate name of the multi-purpose indoor arena where the Knicks play all of their home playoff games?
Which iconic Oscar-nominated filmmaker is universally recognized as the Knicks' most visible superfan on Celebrity Row?
Which Dune and Wonka actor was photographed celebrating courtside with Spike Lee when the Knicks clinched the 2026 Eastern Conference title?
What two-word nickname is affectionately used by fans and media to describe the core group of Knicks players who played together at Villanova University?
What classic 1994 hip-hop song by Goon Squad serves as the team's official anthem, blaring through the arena speakers during home playoff runs?
In 1946, the New York Knicks were founded as charter members of which professional sports league, which later merged with the NBL to form the NBA?
On November 1, 1946, which Knicks player scored the very first basket in NBA / BAA history during a game against the Toronto Huskies?
Who served as the first head coach in franchise history, leading the team from its inaugural 1946 season until 1947?
Which Hall of Fame head coach, famous for his success with the Original Celtics barnstorming team, guided the Knicks to three consecutive NBA Finals appearances from 1951 to 1953?
Who is the only player in New York Knicks history to win the NBA regular season Most Valuable Player award, achieving the feat during the 1969-70 championship season?
On March 2, 1962, the Knicks were the opposing team in Hershey, Pennsylvania, when which NBA center famously scored a record-setting 100 points in a single game?
The Knicks secured their first-ever NBA championship by defeating which Western Conference powerhouse in Game 7 of the 1970 NBA Finals?
When the Knicks won their second NBA championship title in 1973, which specific franchise did they defeat in the NBA Finals?
In December 1988, the Knicks traded center Walt Bellamy and guard Howard Komives to which Eastern Conference franchise to acquire legendary defensive forward Dave DeBusschere?
With a total of 23,665 points scored in a New York uniform, which player stands as the franchise's all-time leading scorer?
With a total of 4,791 assists recorded during his tenure in New York, which legendary point guard holds the franchise's all-time assists record?
Before moving permanently to the current Madison Square Garden in 1968, the Knicks played their primary home games at which previous Manhattan arena location on 49th Street?
Which future Hall of Fame broadcaster and tactical mastermind served as the head coach of the Knicks from 1982 to 1986, guiding Bernard King's scoring peak?
During the 1994 NBA Finals, Patrick Ewing and the Knicks fell just short of a title, losing a grueling seven-game series to which Texas-based franchise?
Which future Hall of Fame head coach resigned from his position via fax in 1995 after leading the Knicks through a fiercely competitive four-year run?
As the first number-eight seed in NBA history to reach the championship round, the 1999 Knicks ultimately lost the NBA Finals to which Western Conference team?
The Knicks have famously retired the jersey number 15 twice to honor which two different players from the 1970s championship teams?
In Game 3 of the 1999 Eastern Conference Finals against the Indiana Pacers, which Knicks forward converted an iconic, game-winning four-point play?
In 1950, which historic sweet-shooting guard broke the NBA's color barrier by becoming the first African American player to step onto an NBA court during a game for the Knicks?
Which high-profile general manager orchestrated the controversial 2004 multi-player blockbuster trade that brought Stephon Marbury to the Knicks?
On January 24, 2014, which Knicks superstar set the current single-game franchise and Madison Square Garden scoring record by exploding for 62 points against the Charlotte Bobcats?
Which former Knicks forward from the 1973 championship team returned to the franchise from 2014 to 2017 to serve as the team's President of Basketball Operations?
During the peak of 'Linsanity' in February 2012, Jeremy Lin memorably outdueled Kobe Bryant by scoring 38 points against which visiting Western Conference franchise?
Who was the assistant coach who stepped up to lead the team during the late 1990s after Pat Riley's departure, ultimately coaching the team to the 1999 NBA Finals?
Which legendary NBA Commissioner drew the famous envelope that awarded the New York Knicks the number-one overall pick in the inaugural 1985 NBA Draft Lottery?
During the 2003 NBA Playoffs against the New Jersey Nets, which Knicks shooting guard scored a brilliant franchise playoff-record 53 points in a single game?
Against which Eastern Conference rival did Patrick Ewing set the franchise single-game playoff record by blocking 9 shots in Game 5 of the 1990 First Round?
Which bruising, point-forward favorite won the NBA Sixth Man of the Year Award with the Knicks for the 1994-95 regular season?
In the 1994-95 regular season, which Knicks guard became the first player in NBA history to successfully make 200 three-pointers in a single season?
Which dynamic center recorded a spectacular, franchise-playoff-record 45 blocks during the team's historic run to the 1999 NBA Finals?
Before Patrick Ewing in 1985, which legendary West Virginia guard was selected by the Knicks as the number-one overall pick in the 1970 NBA Draft?
Against which team did Charles Oakley pull down a staggering, personal Knicks-career-high 24 rebounds in a single game on January 4, 1989?
In Game 7 of the 1970 NBA Finals, Walt Frazier recorded a legendary line of 36 points and how many assists to clinch the championship?
Against which franchise did Jeremy Lin make his very first historic NBA starting appearance on February 6, 2012, launching 'Linsanity'?
Which former NBA player served as the head coach of the Knicks when they secured the Atlantic Division title during the 2012-13 regular season?
Which mercurial shooting guard won the NBA Sixth Man of the Year Award while playing for the Knicks during the 2012-13 season?
In Game 5 of the 1999 NBA Finals, which high-scoring Knicks swingman exploded for 35 points in a losing effort against the San Antonio Spurs?
Which Hall of Fame guard recorded the first officially recognized triple-double in New York Knicks franchise history in December 1964?
Which Italian forward was selected with the 6th overall pick by the New York Knicks in the 2008 NBA Draft?
On April 2, 2010, which homegrown Knicks forward pulled off a historic 37-point, 20-rebound performance against the Golden State Warriors?
Which Canadian wing out of Duke University was drafted 3rd overall by the Knicks in the 2019 NBA Draft?
Nicknamed 'The Unicorn', which international big man was selected 4th overall by the Knicks in 2015 and became an All-Star in 2018?
Which veteran NBA executive left the Indiana Pacers in 2008 to take over as the President of Basketball Operations for the Knicks?
Which fast-paced offensive mastermind was hired to be the head coach of the Knicks from 2008 until his resignation in 2012?
In October 2005, the Knicks completed a major, highly debated trade to acquire center Eddy Curry from which Eastern Conference franchise?
Which undrafted Stanford University guard shocked fans by starting all 82 games and making the NBA All-Rookie First Team for the Knicks in 2010-11?
Which legendary Hall of Fame point guard and coach took over on the Knicks bench for one season spanning 2004 to 2005?
Before signing a massive free-agent contract with the Knicks in 1996, Allan Houston spent the first three seasons of his career with which franchise?
Which explosive 5-foot-9 Knicks point guard became the NBA's first-ever three-time Slam Dunk Contest champion by winning in 2006, 2009, and 2010?
In the 1993 Eastern Conference Semifinals, which Knicks guard hit a critical postseason game-winner to sink the Charlotte Hornets in Game 5?
